creator: tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
text:
At master Web site of IconMaker at http://www.ozemail.com.au/~crn/wm/wings.html
the author says:

 Window Maker has the functionality that IconMaker was used for, hence, 
 it's not maintained anymore.

So, there seems no neason to remain port/package of IconMaker at now.

Fix: 

Remove x11-wm/iconmaker from ports tree.


Sent by Japanese ProntoMail
